title: Sith tattoo
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Citation}}
[[File:StryfeTalon.jpg|thumb|right|250px|[[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Stryfe]] and Sith Lady [[Darth Talon]], prominently displaying their tattoos]]

The term '''[[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Tattoo/Legends|tattoo]]''' referred to a number of different types of body markings that were used by followers of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] [[Sith Order (disambiguation)|order]] and its factions. The [[One Sith]] under [[Darth Krayt]] were prominent practitioners of Sith tattooing. The application of Sith tattoos was painful, owing to the fact that they were applied via [[Sith pincerbug]]s.
